prompt: Edit image 1 by incorporating elements from the references. Use image 2 to add dense, detailed trees around the golf course features. Apply the minimalist, flat style and muted color palette from image 3 to the course fairways and greens. Add a clean title/info block below the map area, inspired by image 3's layout.
prompt_refined:
Edit the golf course map in image 1.

1.  Incorporate dense, detailed trees around all golf course features (fairways, greens, and water bodies), using image 2 as a reference for the tree's appearance, density, and coverage. These trees should fill the currently empty green areas surrounding the course in image 1.
2.  Apply the minimalist, flat graphic style and muted color palette from image 3 to the fairways, greens, and water bodies within image 1, shifting their current visual style.
3.  Add a clean title and information block at the very bottom of the overall canvas, below the main map area. This block should emulate the layout, typography, and dark background style of the information section found at the base of image 3.
objects: Dense, detailed trees (surrounding golf course features, styled like image 2)
Fairways (with minimalist, flat graphic style and muted color palette)
Greens (with minimalist, flat graphic style and muted color palette)
Water bodies (with minimalist, flat graphic style and muted color palette)
Dark background information block (at the bottom of the canvas)
Additional information text (within the information block)
